executive_pitch: The strongest option today is Multiple Options|Community Specialist |Marina View because it gives the best balance of location fit, operational readiness, and alignment with the residential move. Keep Upgraded | Palm View | Hot Tub | Flexible Cheques as the alternative and FULL MARINA VIEW - HIGH FLOOR - PREFECT CONDITION as the fallback while approvals, pricing, and fit-out scope are verified.
